mods.name: Knuckles
mods.author: sunspirt
mods.description: This moveset has been long overdue, however it's finally complete (or as close to complete as possible) Knuckles is a fully unique moveset taken from project M with proper permissions. I want to thank everyone on our team for all the hard work we've put into this and thank the PMDT, Ishmael205, and BringoBrongo for their completed version of Knuckles aswell.
